reason: Successfully tested agent communication - navigated to the app, found and opened the QA-20260320-024128-cpos agent, verified its "idle" status, sent a math question, and received the correct response within seconds.
steps: Step 1 - Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Application loaded successfully with sidebar showing multiple agents
Step 2 - Found "QA-20260320-024128-cpos" agent in sidebar and clicked it - Agent detail page opened, showing "Start a conversation with QA-20260320-024128-cpos"
Step 3 - Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Status indicator shows "idle" (blue dot next to agent name)
Step 4 - Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Message typed into input field and sent using Cmd+Enter keyboard shortcut
Step 5 - Waited for response (up to 3 minutes) - Chat session "Basic Math Question with QA Agent" created and agent responded within 2 seconds
Step 6 - Verified response mentions "4" - Agent's response clearly displays "4." as the answer, confirming correct mathematical computation
